rationale: No new qualitative escalation near Poland; US-Iran settlement claim could slightly ease energy prices, but no direct impact on Polish daily life this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement'
top_events.summary: Trump says Iran deal approved and cancels new strikes; if sustained, could ease oil/gas prices slightly, indirectly benefiting Polish energy costs.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang
top_events.summary: China-North Korea ties revitalized; indirect signal about Russia's support axis and geopolitical alignment, marginal relevance for Poland's security calculus.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues
top_events.summary: No new qualitative escalation reported; war remains background noise for Poland.
